content_base64.description: File contents, base64-encoded. Decoded server-side and written to object storage. Max 10 MB decoded.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this autoresearch training run.

path.description: Relative path within the bundle, e.g. 'train.py', 'predict.py', 'features.sql', or 'eda/iter-3-gbm.ipynb'. Segments are limited to [A-Za-z0-9_.-]; absolute paths and '..' traversal are rejected.
